name: Cobalt Pentest API
description: The Cobalt API provides programmatic access to the Cobalt penetration testing as a service (PTaaS) platform. Manage organizations, pentests, assets, and findings. Authentication uses a personal API token passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header, along with an X-Org-Token header for organization context.
